title: FCW Reviewer LLM Response Schema
description: Structured-output schema for the FCW Reviewer stage LLM call. The LLM emits ONLY advisory_notes[] (max 3 strings). Verdict, checks, and claim_flags are set deterministically by the rule engine and are NOT LLM-overridable. Sprint C.E Phase 1 structural parity to AGM (AD-2026-04-24n). FCW-specific adaptations: actor_risk_matrix and platform_posture_scorecard replace AGM jurisdiction/lab persistent-state modules; MF-flag array presence is checked in R3 extension; attribution-vs-coordination collapse is a named FCW advisory dimension.

advisory_notes.description: Optional prose observations for the Composer internal awareness. Each entry <= 500 characters. Emit [] if nothing useful to surface.
